description: Visual boards for the entire design process — from inspiration and user research through wireframing, component systems, user flows, and design review.

templates.name: Wireframe Board
templates.description: Low-fidelity wireframing for mobile and desktop screens with annotations

templates.name: User Flow Diagram
templates.description: Map user journeys with decision points, screens, and branching paths

templates.name: Design System Board
templates.description: Document a component library with tokens, typography, spacing, and patterns

templates.name: Mood Board
templates.description: Gather visual inspiration: colors, images, textures, fonts, and descriptors

templates.name: UI Review Board
templates.description: Structured design review with screenshots, feedback stickies, and approval tracking
